stemHtml: A maintenance document states that 80% of the static wicks must be functional for a flight to be permitted. On a particular aircraft, 2 out of 7 static wicks on the port side and 1 out of 7 static wicks on the starboard side are inoperative. Is the crew allowed to proceed with the flight?

options.a: Yes, because the majority of the static wicks are operational.
options.b: No, because more than 20% of the static wicks are inoperative.
options.c: Yes, because at least one side meets the operational requirement.
options.d: No, because the total number of inoperative wicks does not meet the safety threshold.
